flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Beloit College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (66.8% → 54.5%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Beloit College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.7k → $60.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Beloit College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.7k → $60.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Beloit College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (67.2% vs 75.3%).
